title: teucrium luteum subsp. gabesianum
intro: Teucrium luteum subsp. gabesianum, also known as the Gabes yellow tea, is a subspecies of the Teucrium luteum plant, a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Teucrium luteum subsp. gabesianum include its ability to alleviate stomach pain, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Teucrium luteum subsp. gabesianum is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in essential oil form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
